title: Computer Systems Design Services

sources.title: U.S. Census Bureau 2022 NAICS definition and search result for 541512
sources.what_it_supports: Official classification context for Computer Systems Design Services and the boundary between the selected systems-integrator archetype and other activity.

sources.title: 2022 Economic Census Products by Industry Statistics API
sources.what_it_supports: The official product-line data describe establishments and product-line revenue, but do not identify a target company's revenue presentation, pass-through, or primary archetype.

sources.title: Statistics of U.S. Businesses program
sources.what_it_supports: Official context that SUSB reports annual paid-employee firm and establishment data by industry and enterprise size; the frozen normalized band count uses that context.

narrative.executive_view: This packet concerns only the frozen project-led computer-systems-integrator archetype within NAICS 541512. Fresh official sources confirm the industry and data-program context, but do not disclose target-company economics; readiness therefore remains unproven.
narrative.revenue_and_pass_through: No target-company accrual revenue policy, TTM ledger, vendor invoice reconciliation, or gross-versus-net resale evidence was available. Recognized revenue and all third-party pass-through therefore remain MISSING rather than being inferred from Census product-line data.
narrative.technical_value: The frozen value basis supplies a source-free project-led role taxonomy, not measured cash costs or removability. The required cash-cost and removability fields are explicitly bounded assumptions and cannot establish controllable value added without a reconciled target denominator.
narrative.implementation: No project-led, target-band operating study with endpoint evidence was found that could support a five-year realization or investment schedule for this specific archetype. Implementation primitives are MISSING rather than borrowed from MSP, software, or staffing models.
narrative.commercial_capture: No evidence was found for retention of operational savings on controllable value added after repricing, renewal mechanics, competitive response, or pass-through. Commercial-retention schedules are MISSING and no implementation or survival effect is placed in them.
narrative.buyability: Official Census sources provide industry context but not marketed, accessible, pursued, won, or closed target counts for U.S. project-led integrators in the specified EBITDA band. Sale availability, access/win, and both capacities are consequently MISSING.
narrative.entry_and_exit: No closed-deal evidence was available that isolates entry-equivalent, lower-middle-market project-led systems integrators from MSPs, staffing, software, and resale-led providers. The normalized state and downside multiple are MISSING, preventing a valuation conclusion.
narrative.operator_survival: No reconciled fixed-base customer-service basket or target-specific operator-control evidence was available. The survival basket is MISSING, so the packet makes no claim about year-five operator-controlled controllable value-added demand.
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: The selected archetype is frozen with overlapping supported count ranges relative to managed-services-led providers. The decisive limitations are missing target accounting, cost, transaction, and operator-transfer records; broad Census data cannot fill those gaps.

scenario_narratives.low: Low case is not quantified because target revenue, pass-through, and operational evidence are absent; no pessimistic proxy is substituted.
scenario_narratives.base: Base case is not quantified because the packet has no target-specific reconciled controllable-value-added denominator or validated realization schedule.
scenario_narratives.high: High case is not quantified because favorable outcomes would require the same unavailable target accounting, commercial, transaction, and operator-transfer evidence.

recognized_revenue.rationale: No target-company trailing-twelve-month accrual recognized-revenue record was supplied.
caveats: Industry product-line statistics are not target-company recognized revenue.

evidence.rationale: No target accounting presentation or documented pass-through reconciliation was supplied.
caveats: Empty partitions are structural only and do not assert zero actual pass-through.

employee_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Normalized TTM USD employee-cash-cost assumption for the selected archetype; not a target-company observation.

amount.rationale: Frozen assumption-mode value basis requires a bounded employee cash-cost primitive; no target records permit a measured amount.
caveats: This is a source-free structural assumption, not a revenue share, target-company cost, or validated controllable-value-added numerator.

controllable_contractor_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Normalized TTM USD controllable-contractor cash-cost assumption, excluding documented outside-provider pass-through if later identified.

amount.rationale: Frozen assumption-mode value basis requires a separate bounded controllable-contractor cash-cost primitive; no target ledgers permit measurement.
caveats: This excludes only documented reimbursed outside-provider work; actual classification remains unverified.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for the frozen architecture and design role.
caveats: Not based on task time or a measured staffing model.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for the frozen implementation and integration role.
caveats: Not based on task time or a measured staffing model.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for the frozen project-control and quality role.
caveats: Not based on task time or a measured staffing model.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for the frozen deployment support and training role.
caveats: Not based on task time or a measured staffing model.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for the frozen sales and account role.
caveats: Not based on task time or a measured staffing model.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for the frozen corporate operations role.
caveats: Not based on task time or a measured staffing model.

r1.rationale: No target-archetype endpoint evidence supports year-one realization.

r2.rationale: No target-archetype endpoint evidence supports year-two realization.

r3.rationale: No target-archetype endpoint evidence supports year-three realization.

r4.rationale: No target-archetype endpoint evidence supports year-four realization.

r5.rationale: No target-archetype endpoint evidence supports year-five realization.

k0.rationale: No evidence supports upfront implementation investment.

k1.rationale: No evidence supports year-one implementation investment.

k2.rationale: No evidence supports year-two implementation investment.

k3.rationale: No evidence supports year-three implementation investment.

k4.rationale: No evidence supports year-four implementation investment.

k5.rationale: No evidence supports year-five implementation investment.

c1.rationale: No retained-savings evidence supports year-one commercial retention.

c2.rationale: No retained-savings evidence supports year-two commercial retention.

c3.rationale: No retained-savings evidence supports year-three commercial retention.

c4.rationale: No retained-savings evidence supports year-four commercial retention.

c5.rationale: No retained-savings evidence supports year-five commercial retention.

target_archetype_coverage.rationale: Frozen selected-archetype counts divided by the frozen normalized 3,524-firm target band: 1,551 base firms, with 1,057 and 1,973 endpoints.
caveats: This is a frozen enumeration input, not a Census count of uniquely identified project-led target companies.

five_year_sale_availability.rationale: No defined-period data identified marketed and accessible target-archetype companies in the EBITDA band.

buyer_access_win_share.rationale: No evidence identified access and win outcomes conditional on target-archetype sale availability.

deal_execution_capacity_5y.rationale: No buyer-specific diligence, financing, and closing capacity evidence was supplied.

integration_onboarding_capacity_5y.rationale: No accountable operational onboarding capacity evidence was supplied.

buy_multiple.rationale: No closed, entry-equivalent target-archetype transaction-multiple evidence was available.

normalized_y5_operating_state.rationale: No evidence can identify a canonical entry-equivalent year-five operating state without target accounting and operating records.
caveats: A missing state prevents an entry-equivalent downside-multiple conclusion.

anchor.rationale: No entry-equivalent comparable-multiple anchor was identified for the missing normalized state.

operator_controlled_value_added_demand_s.rationale: No reconciled baseline customer-service basket, pass-through boundary, or named-operator control evidence was supplied.

cross_checks.target_identity_preserved: The packet retains the frozen project-led systems-integrator archetype and does not generalize to all NAICS 541512 firms.
cross_checks.pass_through_removed_once: No pass-through amount is authored; the empty canonical partition does not assert zero pass-through and no amount enters employee or contractor cash cost.
cross_checks.removability_only_in_v: Role judgments address only removable or avoidable cash cost and do not include pricing, commercial response, transaction activity, or survival.
cross_checks.investment_only_in_i: Implementation investment remains MISSING and is not embedded in realization, commercial retention, valuation, or survival.
cross_checks.commercial_only_in_c: Commercial-retention schedules remain MISSING and do not contain implementation cost or operator-controlled demand survival.
cross_checks.buyer_access_separate_from_price: Sale availability and access/win are MISSING separately; no price concession is embedded in either field.
cross_checks.p_uses_frozen_y5_state: The normalized state and bound downside anchor are both MISSING; no alternative operating state is introduced.
cross_checks.p_excludes_c_and_survival: The closed valuation exclusion map excludes commercial retention and constant-price survival, among all other prohibited channels.
cross_checks.survival_is_constant_price_value_added: The survival basket is MISSING because no fixed-base, constant-quality controllable-value-added reconciliation is available.

top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Without a reconciled R_cva denominator, controllable value added and survival cannot be computed.
No operating realization, investment, or retained-savings endpoint can be assessed.
Buyability cannot be established for the frozen target archetype.
Valuation resilience and constant-price year-five demand remain unproven.

reviewer_note: Fresh official Census research supports only industry/program context. Target-specific accounting, pass-through, transaction, and operator-control inputs were unavailable; MISSING fields are intentional and the frozen assumption-mode cash-cost and role fields are candid source-free assumptions.
